case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. YURI SAFRONOV

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-18-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-18-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DORAN GIN, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. DEFENDANT YURI SAFRONOV IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

REPRESENTED BY GIN DORAN, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SAFRONOV, YURI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-17-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE DORAN GIN, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER FOR THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S OFFICE OF THE TRESURER/TAX COLLECTOR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT YURI SAFRONOV. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ORDER CONTINUE TO JANUARY 18, 2017 AT 1:30 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAFRONOV, YURI $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.97 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.97 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 4/18/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "DELAYED DUE TO MISDELIVERY-RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
